name: Encharge (Actions)
description: Encharge is a marketing automation platform that enables B2B SaaS companies to automate their marketing processes to increase customer engagement, retention, and revenue.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Encharge.io API Key. This can be found on your [Account page](https://app.encharge.io/settings/api-keys).

trackEvent.title: Track Event
trackEvent.description: Track an event in Encharge for a known or anonymous person.

userFields.label: User Fields
userFields.description: Any default or custom field of the user. On the left-hand side, input the API name of the field as seen in your Encharge account. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. Any properties that don't exist will be created automatically. See more information in [Encharge's documentation](https://help.encharge.io/article/206-create-and-manage-custom-fields).

email.label: Email
email.description: The email address of the user.

segmentAnonymousId.label: Anonymous ID
segmentAnonymousId.description: An anonymous identifier for this user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

groupId.label: Group ID
groupId.description: An ID associating the event with a group.

ip.label: IP Address
ip.description: The IP address of the user.

userAgent.label: User Agent
userAgent.description: The user agent of the user. Used to determine the device, browser and operating system.

page.label: Page
page.description: Information about the page where the event occurred.

url.label: URL
url.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred.

title.label: Title
title.description: The title of the page where the event occurred.

referrer.label: Referrer
referrer.description: The referrer of the page where the event occurred.

path.label: Path
path.description: The path of the page where the event occurred.

search.label: Search
search.description: The search query of the page where the event occurred.

location.label: Location
location.description: Information about the location of the user.

identifyUser.title: Identify User
identifyUser.description: Identify a user in Encharge. This will create a new user if the user does not exist in Encharge.

user.label: User Fields
user.description: Fields to associate with the user in Encharge. Any unexisting fields will be automatically created in Encharge.

email.label: Email
email.description: The email address of the user.

segmentAnonymousId.label: Anonymous ID
segmentAnonymousId.description: An anonymous identifier for this user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

groupId.label: Group ID
groupId.description: An ID associating the event with a group.

userAgent.description: The user agent of the user. Used to determine the device, browser and operating system.

page.description: Information about the page where the event occurred.

url.label: URL
url.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred.

title.label: Title
title.description: The title of the page where the event occurred.

referrer.label: Referrer
referrer.description: The referrer of the page where the event occurred.

path.label: Path
path.description: The path of the page where the event occurred.

search.label: Search
search.description: The search query of the page where the event occurred.

location.label: Location
location.description: Information about the location of the user.

properties.label: Page View Properties
properties.description: Custom properties to send with the pageview. Please note that URL, title, refererrer, path and search are automatically collected and don't have to be mapped here.

userFields.label: User Fields
userFields.description: Any default or custom field of the user. On the left-hand side, input the API name of the field as seen in your Encharge account. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. Any properties that don't exist will be created automatically. See more information in [Encharge's documentation](https://help.encharge.io/article/206-create-and-manage-custom-fields).

email.description: The email address of the user.

segmentAnonymousId.label: Anonymous ID
segmentAnonymousId.description: An anonymous identifier for this user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

groupId.label: Group ID
groupId.description: An ID associating the event with a group.

ip.description: The IP address of the user.

userAgent.label: User Agent
userAgent.description: The user agent of the user. Used to determine the device, browser and operating system.

page.description: Information about the page where the event occurred.

url.label: URL
url.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred.

title.label: Title
title.description: The title of the page where the event occurred.

referrer.description: The referrer of the page where the event occurred.

search.description: The search query of the page where the event occurred.

aliasUser.title: Alias User
aliasUser.description: Change the User ID of an user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The new User ID to associate with the user in Encharge.

previousUserId.label: Previous User ID
previousUserId.description: The previous User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

createUpdateObject.title: Create or Update Object
createUpdateObject.description: Create or Update a Custom Object (including Companies) in Encharge. If an email or a user ID is provided, an Encharge user will be associated with the object. A new user will be created if the email or user ID does not exist in Encharge.

objectType.label: Object Type
objectType.description: The type of Encharge object to create or update.

externalId.label: External Object ID
externalId.description: An ID from your app/database that is used to uniquely identify the object in Encharge.

id.label: Object ID
id.description: The Encharge ID of the object. Usually, you want to omit this and use External ID.

objectData.label: Object Fields
objectData.description: Data for the object fields in Encharge. Any unexisting fields will be ignored.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The User ID of the user to associate with the object. If no email or user ID is provided, no user will be created and associated.

email.label: Email
email.description: The email of the user to associate with the object. If no email or user ID is provided, no user will be created and associated.

addTag.title: Tag User
addTag.description: Add a tag to a user in Encharge.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: The tags to add, separated by commas.

email.label: Email
email.description: The email address of the user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

segmentAnonymousId.label: Anonymous ID
segmentAnonymousId.description: An anonymous identifier for this user.

removeTag.title: Untag User
removeTag.description: Remove tags from a user in Encharge.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: The tags to remove, separated by commas.

email.label: Email
email.description: The email address of the user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

segmentAnonymousId.label: Anonymous ID
segmentAnonymousId.description: An anonymous identifier for this user.
